description:
Leaf from the court notebook.
Recto: Legal record of the court of Fustat. Dated: before the middle of Nisan 1411 Seleucid = March 1100 CE. Yosef b. Yosef al-Labbān (the milkman), receives from 'the money of the poor' one dinar as a loan to be paid back in weekly installments of two dirhams. A term is set for the beginning of the repayment, but not for its end. This and the following entry in the record book of the court of Fustat were written and signed by the judge and scholar Yiṣḥaq b. Shemuel (the Spaniard). This record is also signed by Moshe b. Ṣalḥūn and Ṣedaqa b. Shelomo ha-Levi. (Information from Goitein's attached notes and Mediterranean Society, I, p. 383.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
